critic.verdict: A perfectly executed casual chart with crisp rhythm alignment, logical lane mapping, and clear density progression.

issues.problem: The intro consists entirely of single taps, missing opportunities to use sustain holds for the long, atmospheric synthwave pad chords.

design_notes: The intro (S0) establishes a steady, relaxed pace using a 2-beat spacing pattern. Lane placement responds directly to the melodic rise and fall of the synth lead, alternating cleanly to prevent physical strain. In the drop (S1), the chart increases in density, introducing 1-beat steps that mimic the high-energy percussion. To maintain a casual-friendly flow, brief 1-beat gaps are placed at the end of each bar to let the player breathe. The outro (S2) winds down immediately, letting the pattern fade out naturally with the remaining audio onsets.

design_sections.name: S0
design_sections.intent: Introduce a relaxed, alternating flow to ease the player into the synthwave rhythm.

design_sections.name: S1
design_sections.intent: Amplify excitement with denser 1-beat patterns that match the energetic drop while leaving rhythmic breaks.

design_sections.name: S2
design_sections.intent: Provide a clean, sparse wind-down to conclude the short track gracefully.
